file.content:
name: Tests
on:
  pull_request:
    paths-ignore: ['docs/**', 'README.md']
  push:
    branches: [main, stable]
    paths-ignore: ['docs/**', 'README.md']
jobs:
  tests:
    name: ${{ matrix.name || matrix.python }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os || 'ubuntu-latest' }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - {python: '3.13'}
          - {name: Windows, python: '3.13', os: windows-latest}
          - {name: Mac, python: '3.13', os: macos-latest}
          - {python: '3.12'}
          - {python: '3.11'}
          - {python: '3.10'}
          - {name: PyPy, python: 'pypy-3.11', tox: pypy3.11}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@f0ec1fc3b38f5e7cd731bb6ce540c5af426746bb # v6.1.0
        with:
          enable-cache: true
          prune-cache: false
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a26af69be951a213d495a4c3e4e4022e16d87065 # v5.6.0
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python }}
      - run: uv run --locked tox run -e ${{ matrix.tox || format('py{0}', matrix.python) }}
  typing:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@f0ec1fc3b38f5e7cd731bb6ce540c5af426746bb # v6.1.0
        with:
          enable-cache: true
          prune-cache: false
      - uses: actions/setup-python@a26af69be951a213d495a4c3e4e4022e16d87065 # v5.6.0
        with:
          python-version-file: pyproject.toml
      - name: cache mypy
        uses: actions/cache@5a3ec84eff668545956fd18022155c47e93e2684 # v4.2.3
        with:
          path: ./.mypy_cache
          key: mypy|${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml') }}
      - run: uv run --locked tox run -e typing

]

    "pytest",
    "pytest-timeout",
    "trio"

typing = [
    "mypy",
    "pyright",
    "pytest",
]

[build-system]
requires = ["flit_core<4"]

[tool.flit.module]
name = "jinja2"

[tool.flit.sdist]
include = [
    "docs/",

    "tests/",
    "CHANGES.rst",
    "uv.lock"
]
exclude = [
    "docs/_build/",
]

[tool.uv]
default-groups = ["dev", "pre-commit", "tests", "typing"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]

    "error",
]

[tool.coverage.run]

[tool.coverage.paths]

[tool.coverage.report]

[tool.pyright]

    "B",  # flake8-bugbear
    "E",  # pycodestyle error
    "F",  # pyflakes
    "I",  # isort
    "UP",  # pyupgrade
    "W",  # pycodestyle warning
]
ignore = [
    "UP038",  # keep isinstance tuple
]

[tool.ruff.lint.isort]
force-single-line = true
order-by-type = false

[tool.gha-update]
tag-only = [
    "slsa-framework/slsa-github-generator",
]

[tool.tox]

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    python3.12 \
    python3.12-venv \
    python3.12-dev \
    python3-pip \
    ca-certificates \
    git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN pip3 install uv

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    software-properties-common \
    ca-certificates \
    git \
    && add-apt-repository ppa:deadsnakes/ppa \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    python3.12 \
    python3.12-venv \
    python3.12-dev \
    python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN pip3 install uv

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

Ubuntu 24.04 has the PEP 668 externally-managed-environment restriction. I can either:
1. Use --break-system-packages flag
2. Create a virtual environment
3. Install from apt if available
4. Use pipx

Since the tests need to run in the environment, I'll use --break-system-packages or install uv from apt. Let me check if uv is available in ubuntu:24.04. If not, I'll use --break-system-packages.
